---
title: "test_muninn.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\contracts\test_muninn.py"
loc: 81
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.20
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 7.33
overall_score: 4.48
---

## Intent
The `test_muninn.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestWatcherOscillationLock, test_echo_detection_locks_file, TestNornWarden, test_get_next_target_finds_first_actionable, TestEddaWarden, test_detects_missing_docstrings, TestMuninnCrucible, test_rollback_restores_backup, test_generate_gauntlet_calls_uplink, TestMuninnHeartEndurance, test_endurance_limit_stop. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestWatcherOscillationLock, test_echo_detection_locks_file, TestNornWarden, test_get_next_target_finds_first_actionable, TestEddaWarden, test_detects_missing_docstrings, TestMuninnCrucible, test_rollback_restores_backup, test_generate_gauntlet_calls_uplink, TestMuninnHeartEndurance, test_endurance_limit_stop. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 42 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_heart](file://src.sentinel.muninn_heart)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_crucible](file://src.sentinel.muninn_crucible)
- [src.sentinel.stability](file://src.sentinel.stability)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.norn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.norn)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.edda](file://src.sentinel.wardens.edda)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `TestWatcherOscillationLock`
- `test_echo_detection_locks_file`
- `TestNornWarden`
- `test_get_next_target_finds_first_actionable`
- `TestEddaWarden`
- `test_detects_missing_docstrings`
- `TestMuninnCrucible`
- `test_rollback_restores_backup`
- `test_generate_gauntlet_calls_uplink`
- `TestMuninnHeartEndurance`
- `test_endurance_limit_stop`
